docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-01-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HECHT, HILARY E RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZEPHYR ARTS COLLECTIVE AKA ZEPHYR SYMPHONY $572.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $652.00, DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF $553 PRINCIPAL PLUS $19.86 PREJUDGMENT INTEREST FROM 12/21/2025 THROUGH 05/01/2026 PER CIVIL CODE SECTION 3287. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $566.03 FILED BY HECHT, HILARY E AS TO DEFENDANT ZEPHYR ARTS COLLECTIVE AKA ZEPHYR SYMPHONY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-01-2026 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-19-2026, PERSONAL SERVICE, SERVICE FEE: $50.00 AS TO DEFENDANT ZEPHYR ARTS COLLECTIVE AKA ZEPHYR SYMPHONY
STIPULATION TO ALLOW THE CASE TO BE HEARD BY A JUDGE PRO TEM. FILED BY HECHT, HILARY E

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-01-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-01-2026 BY JUDGE PRO TEM JAMES CHANG. PLAINTIFF HILARY E. HECHT IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ZEPHYR ARTS COLLECTIVE AKA ZEPHYR SYMPHONY IS NOT PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JAMES CHANG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
